First Release

v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0 Release

v0.2.0.description:
- Reaper's Coast has been added alongside its new goal, leave Reaper's Coast.
- Lockpicks and Trap Disarming Kits have been added into the item pool

Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archiplago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0 Release

v0.3.0.description:
- The Nameless Isle has now been added with its respective goal, Escape The Nameless Isle.
- Hit list goals have been added for each act, select a list of enemies to kill and goal upon eliminating them all.
- Equipment has been added to the item pool. Random equipment at four different preset qualities can be found.
- Traps can be added into the item pool. These inflict a random status effect to either the whole party or one random party member at varying lengths.

Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0 Release

v0.4.0.description:
New:
- Arx has been added, and with that the whole game from start to finish is playable
- Arx has its respective hit list goal as well containing: Loic the Immaculate, Voidwoken Bloodfury, Sanguinia Tell, Karon, Isbeil, Thorny Suncaller, Lord Linder Kemm, Adramahlihk, Contaminated Horror, and Braccus Rex
- Grenades and runes have been added to the filler pool
- The client will now let you know when a hit has been completed and what your remaining hits are

Previous Act Changes:
- Non hostile Trompdoy checks have been replaced with the hostile Trompdoy checks
- The magisters on the boat during the Reaper's Eye encounter with Daeyena have been added as checks
- Removed Flourescent Voidlings as checks as them blowing up does not trigger a kill and thus are missable
- Healing Touch and Most Dangerous When Cornered are now separate
- The Eternal Worshipper, Hot Under the Collar, Metalwork (The Forgotten and the Damned sub quest), Burial Rites, and A Trial for All Seasons are now included

Bugfixes:
- Choosing the communication directory actually works now, and will no longer save files in incorrect directories or save the incorrect directory itself (by crashing but alas)
- Deathlink interactions regarding custom characters now work as expected
- Killing or being killed under the effect of chicken or cow form will now correctly send checks/deathlinks
- A Fate Worse Than Death works now
- Siding with the magisters during Window of Opportunity works now


Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
v0.4.0.title: v0.4.0 Release

v0.5.0.description:
New:
- Exp has been removed
- Source masters can no longer give source points
- Logic has been reworked accordingly

You will now only be able to level up and increase your maximum amount of source points by obtaining AP items. This is to facilitate better logic as well as reliance on other AP games. 

Changes:
- Grebb the Scholar has been removed as a check (its not even a quest in DE, whoops)

Bugfixes:
- Hired henchmen now work properly in regards to deathlink and stat increasing items
- Multiplayer custom characters work properly in regards to deathlink and stat increasing items


Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
v0.5.0.title: v0.5.0

v0.5.2.description:
Changes:
- Containersanity setting had been added, still work in progress. Functions in act 1 alone, do not enabled outside of act 1 goals.

Bugfixes:
- Confirmed path fix for linux
- Fixed Magister Ellwin, Magister Swentin, and Source Hound Phylip not correctly sending checks
- Fixed Saltwater Crocodile naming scheme

This release is NOT backwards compatible with 0.5.0.

Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)

DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)
